title: Count to Ten
goal: Use a Repeat block with the number 10 so the cat counts to ten.

steps.prompt: Drag a Repeat block into the workspace.
Change the number inside it to 10.
Put a Do block inside the Repeat.

canned_hints: The number in the Repeat block says how many times to do it.
Click the number to change it.
What if you put 100 there? (Press play and see!)

success_check.message_missing: You need a Repeat block with a Do block inside!
